prompts.text: Why did the cat knock everything off the table?
The best thing about Mondays is ___
Scientists have confirmed that happiness is just ___
What do you say right before things go terribly wrong?
The real reason dogs bark at nothing is ___
What's the worst thing to accidentally say out loud at work?
I told my boss ___ and now there's a mandatory meeting about it.
The company's new wellness policy involves ___

answers.text: A very confused penguin
The last slice of birthday cake
Aggressive positivity
The WiFi password
Forgetting why I walked into the room
A motivational poster no one asked for
Talking to my pet like it understands me
Pretending to be busy
My left shoe
A surprise fire drill at the worst possible moment
That one relative who asks too many questions
Trusting a GPS into a dead end
Blaming the dog
Running for the bus and missing it anyway
The vending machine eating my money
A seagull with a personal grudge
Absolute silence
A very long queue for something disappointing
The manual no one reads
A pen that only works sometimes
Leftover birthday cake from three days ago
A strongly worded letter to nobody
Getting the charger cord wrong three times in a row
A dog wearing a tiny hat
Autocorrect betrayal
A group chat nobody mutes
Pretending the meeting already ended
A receipt that is somehow three feet long
That coworker who microwaves fish
A meeting that should have been an email
Rage-typing in all caps
Blaming it on the algorithm
An unsolicited opinion from someone who just walked in
Fully agreeing while planning to ignore it
Copy-pasting from last year's report
A performance review full of 'opportunities for growth'
